name: JSF++: Shall Rules Verified
description: Compliance with 'shall' rules is verified (automatically or manually) before code is committed.
rationale: JSF++ §4.2.1: 'shall' rules are mandatory requirements that must be followed and that require verification, either automatic or manual.
source: JSF Air Vehicle C++ Coding Standards (Lockheed Martin, Doc. 2RDU00001 Rev C, Dec 2005). https://www.stroustrup.com/JSF-AV-rules.pdf
